dsp_disclaimer: DSP usage percentages are based on the Helix firmware 3.80 specification. Actual values may vary based on model complexity and effect parameters. Mono and stereo modes have different DSP loads.

blocks.name: Adriatic Delay
blocks.description: This is the Adriatic Delay effect block for the HX Stomp.

parameters.name: Time
parameters.description: Sets the delay time between the dry signal and the first echo repeat.

parameters.name: Scale
parameters.description: Controls the scale of the effect.

parameters.name: Feedback
parameters.description: Controls the amount of signal fed back into the effect, increasing repeats or resonance.

parameters.name: Noise
parameters.description: Controls the noise of the effect.

parameters.name: BBD Size
parameters.description: Controls the bbd size of the effect.

parameters.name: Mix
parameters.description: Blends the dry (unprocessed) and wet (processed) signals.

parameters.name: Level
parameters.description: Sets the overall output level of the block.

parameters.name: Rate
parameters.description: Controls the speed of the modulation effect.

parameters.name: Depth
parameters.description: Controls the intensity or depth of the modulation effect.

parameters.name: Spread
parameters.description: Controls the spread of the effect.

parameters.name: Headroom
parameters.description: Controls the headroom of the effect.

parameters.name: Note Sync
parameters.description: Controls the note sync of the effect.

parameters.name: Tempo Sync
parameters.description: Controls the tempo sync of the effect.
